description_zh: 一张照片里有两只猫,模型应主动要求重拍单猫
description_en: Two cats in one photo — model should proactively ask user to retake with single cat

expectations.rationale: must surface the multi-cat issue and request a single-cat retake

qualitative_criteria_zh: 应该主动告知主人有两只猫,无法准确分析哪一只
应该建议主人重新拍一张'只有 Mochi 单独入镜'的照片
不应该硬选其中一只来评分,也不应该把两只混着评
qualitative_criteria_en: Should proactively note that two cats are visible and analysis can't reliably attribute findings
Should ask the owner to retake with just Mochi alone in the frame
Should NOT pick one cat at random or merge findings across both
